scope_note: QA Witt Tower EEG Spectral Entropy Orbit Discriminator cert [450]. Fourth feature type in Witt tower empirical chain: multi-channel spectral entropy H_norm = -sum(p_i log2 p_i)/log2(N_freq). Data: Siena Scalp EEG Database, patient PN01, PN01-1.edf; Detti P et al. (2020) PhysioNet doi:10.13026/s9f6-9n95 (CC-BY 4.0); 35 channels, 512 Hz. Seizures: seizure 1 at 10218-10272s (54s, 10 x 5s windows); seizure 2 at 46353-46427s (74s, 14 x 5s windows); total ictal=24 windows. Interictal: 9218-10218s (200 x 5s windows). Feature: scipy.signal.welch (nperseg=256, noverlap=128) on 8 channels, PSD summed, normalized to probability mass, H = -sum(p_i log2 p_i), H_norm = H/log2(128). Theorem NT: EEG voltage (mV) is observer projection (pyedflib read); PSD and H_norm are observer layer (scipy welch + normalization); rank bin in Z/27Z is QA integer state. This cert demonstrates feature-type independence: cert [446] energy RMS puts ictal in T2 (maximal amplitude); cert [450] spectral entropy puts ictal in T0 (Singularity -- maximal phase synchrony, minimal spectral entropy). Same event, different observer projection, different orbit. CERTIFIED FACTS: (C1) 200 interictal + 24 ictal = 224 windows PASS. (C2) mean_ictal_H=0.417 < 0.75 x mean_inter_H=0.667 (threshold 0.500) PASS. (C3) ALL 24 ictal windows in T0 (Singularity orbit); hypergeometric log10_p=-12.65 PASS. (C4) Mean H_norm: interictal=0.667 > ictal=0.417; diff=0.250 > 0.20 PASS. (C5) Ictal tier set={T0}; interictal spans {T0,T1,T2} (51/75/74) PASS. (C6) Relative entropy reduction 37.5% >= 30% PASS. 6 checks PASS; 8/8 fixtures PASS. PRIMARY SOURCES: Detti P et al. (2020) doi:10.13026/s9f6-9n95 (Siena Scalp EEG); Inouye T et al. (1991) doi:10.1016/0013-4694(91)90000-2 (EEG spectral entropy); Wall HS (1960) doi:10.1080/00029890.1960.11989541 (Witt tower theory). Structural parent: cert [110]. Empirical chain extends certs [442]-[449]. Validated 2026-06-18.
